caution: Drive with caution near the school.

choice: Pick your choice from the list.

courage: It takes courage to try something new.

drawer: My socks are in the top drawer.
dried: The clothes dried quickly in the sun.

friends: I made two new friends at school today.
fruit: An apple is a tasty fruit.
glitter: The card had lots of glitter on it.
goes: She goes to school on the bus.

hedge: A small bird hopped along the hedge.
helicopter: A helicopter landed in the field.

honey: I like honey on my toast.

hospital: Grandma was taken to hospital after she fell.

illustration: Each page had a colourful illustration.
instrument: The violin is my favourite instrument.

key: I lost the key to my front door.
